title: Christmas Small 3 Piece Stacking Nested Gift Box Set Santa Design
features: PERFECT GIFT ACCESSORY - These nested Chistmas Gift Boxes stack into a fun Christmas Santa decoration, why put gifts under the tree when you can stack them into their own special decoration

STYLISH FESTIVE DESIGN - This set of boxes has a really special Santa design. The top box has a Santa face with a bobble hat for a lid, the middle box comes with arms on the side, the base is designed like a Santa Suit with belt and bottom button

PREMIUM QUALITY - Made with sturdy and thick materials for great durability, ensuring your precious gifts are safe. Each box has a strong sturdy lid that fits snuggly and is not loose making the decoration very secure
EASY TO ASSEMBLE & REUSABLE - Supplied pre-built with no assembly, just need to be filled and stacked. Nested so can be easily stored and re-used
SPACE FOR LOTS OF GIFTS - Approx measurements of each box includes: Box 1: 15.5 x 15.5 x 12cm, Box 2: 13 x 11 x 10cm, Box 3: 10 x 10 x 8cm
description: Set of 3 stackable gift boxes In a Santa design. These stackable gift boxes are Ideal for wrapping loved ones gifts. Approx measurements of each box includes: Box 1: 15.5 x 15.5 x 12cm, Box 2: 13 x 11 x 10cm, Box 3: 10 x 10 x 8cm
